coreMeaning.en: past tense of untangle; freed from tangles or confusion

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: un(解)+tangle(缠绕)+d=已解开的

coreMeaning.cn: 解开；理清（第三人称单数）

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: untangle的第三人称单数
un(未)+tapped(被开发)=尚未被开采的宝藏

coreMeaning.cn: 未失去光泽的；未玷污的
coreMeaning.en: not tarnished; keeping original brightness and purity

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: un(未)+tarnish(失泽)+ed=从未失去光泽的
un(未)+tasted(品尝过)=尚未尝过的滋味

coreMeaning.cn: 未经教导的；自然的；本能的

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: un(未)+taught(被教)=没有经过正式教育的

coreMeaning.en: to cause someone to forget or discard what they have learned

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: un(反)+teach(教)=消除已学的东西

coreMeaning.cn: 难以言说的；不可言传的
coreMeaning.en: unable to be told or expressed in words

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: un(不)+tell(言说)+able=无法用语言表达的
imageChain: 情感→超越语言→难以言说

coreMeaning.cn: 未回火的；未缓和的；毫无节制的
coreMeaning.en: not tempered or moderated; without restraint

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: un(未)+tempered(回火/缓和)=未经回火处理的金属/未加节制的情绪
imageChain: 金属→未淬火→脆弱/情绪不加控制

coreMeaning.cn: 站不住脚的；无法防守的
coreMeaning.en: not able to be maintained or defended against attack or objection

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: un(不)+ten(持守)+able=无法坚守的阵地/站不住脚的论点

coreMeaning.en: not occupied by a tenant; empty

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: un(无)+tenant(租户)+ed=没有租户居住的

coreMeaning.en: to release from a tether or restraint

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: un(解除)+tether(束缚)=解除绳索
untether + d = 已解除束缚的

coreMeaning.cn: 不可想象的；难以置信的
coreMeaning.en: too unlikely or undesirable to be considered; inconceivable

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: un(不)+think(想象)+able=不可想象的
un(不)+thinking(思考)=不加思考的鲁莽行为

coreMeaning.en: in an unthinking manner; without thought

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: unthinking + ly = 不思考地

coreMeaning.en: not causing a feeling of threat or danger

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: un(不)+threatening(威胁的)=没有威胁感的
un(不)+tidy(整洁)=杂乱的

coreMeaning.en: to undo a knot or fastening; to release

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: un(解)+tie(系)=解开绳结

coreMeaning.en: not tied; released from a fastening

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: untie + d = 已解开的

coreMeaning.en: up to the point in time when; before

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: until = 直到某时间点为止
un(未)+till(耕)+ed=未经耕种的荒地

coreMeaning.en: the quality of being untimely; inappropriate timing

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: untimely + ness = 时机不当的性质

coreMeaning.en: happening at an unsuitable or unfortunate time; premature

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: un(不)+timely(及时)=时机不对；过早而来的死亡

coreMeaning.en: not tinged; without a trace of something

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: un(未)+tinged(染色)=纯粹无杂质的

coreMeaning.cn: 不知疲倦的；坚持不懈的
coreMeaning.en: not becoming tired; showing great effort

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: un(不)+tiring(让人疲倦的)=永不疲倦的努力

coreMeaning.cn: 不知疲倦地；孜孜不倦地

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: untiring + ly = 不知疲倦地

coreMeaning.en: having no title; not holding a noble title

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: un(无)+titled(有标题)=没有标题的作品
unto = 到…/给…，文学/圣经语体

coreMeaning.cn: 数不清的；未说出的；不可言喻的
coreMeaning.en: not told or revealed; too great to be measured

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: un(未)+told(讲述)=未曾讲述的；数不清的苦难

coreMeaning.cn: 不可触碰的；不可打败的；不可侵犯的
coreMeaning.en: unable to be touched or influenced; beyond criticism

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: un(不)+touchable(可触碰)=不可侵犯的；社会低种姓不可接触者

coreMeaning.cn: 不可接触者（印度低种姓）；不可侵犯者
coreMeaning.en: plural of untouchable; members of the lowest caste in India

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: untouchable的复数
imageChain: 种姓制度→底层→不可接触

coreMeaning.cn: 未触碰的；未改变的；原封不动的
coreMeaning.en: not touched; remaining in original state

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: un(未)+touched(触碰过)=原封不动的，未受影响的

coreMeaning.cn: 不吉利的；不合适的；麻烦的
coreMeaning.en: unexpected and undesirable; causing inconvenience or difficulty

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: un(不)+toward(顺从)=不顺从的；不顺利的麻烦
untoward + ly = 不利地，麻烦地

coreMeaning.en: the quality of being untoward; inconvenience

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: untoward + ness = 不顺的性质

coreMeaning.en: not tracked or followed; leaving no trace

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: un(未)+tracked(追踪)=未被追踪监控的

coreMeaning.cn: 非传统的；不因循守旧的

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: un(非)+traditional(传统的)=打破传统的

coreMeaning.cn: 未经训练的；未受过专业教育的
coreMeaning.en: not having received training or instruction

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: un(未)+trained(训练过的)=没有经过专业训练的
untidy + er = 比…更凌乱
untidy + est = 最凌乱的
untidy + ily = 凌乱地

coreMeaning.en: the state of being untidy; messiness

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: untidy + ness = 不整洁的状态
untill = until的双l变体拼法，功能相同

coreMeaning.en: to restore to an untilted position

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: un(解除)+tilt(倾斜)=恢复到水平位置
